content: Open-Meteo Forecast API (/v1/forecast) 'current' param exposes temperature_2m plus humidity, apparent_temperature, precipitation, wind etc from 15-minutely model data. Same endpoint's past_days param (up to 92) plus daily=temperature_2m_mean,max,min gives a continuous recent-day series without switching endpoints -- but this is blended past-forecast-run data, not true reanalysis observations; true reanalysis (Historical Weather API) lags ~5-7 days (ERA5) so cannot supply 'today'.
